arguments.data:
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: my-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
  - port:
      number: 80
      name: http
      protocol: HTTP
    hosts:
    - "*"

content.text: "ERROR: Resource already exists: Gateway \"my-gateway\" in namespace \"istio-system\" already exists. Use the 'patch' action to update it."
"group is required and must be \"networking.istio.io\" or \"security.istio.io\""
"ERROR: Resource already exists: Gateway \"my-gateway\" in namespace \"istio-system\" already exists. Use the 'patch' action to update it."
